feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Bridge report mixing accounts and versions - SAP analytics cloud
entry.content:
Hello, 
is there any simple way to create this king of chart
kind of waterfall assuming version are made out of "accounts"
I my only result was on the second screen below.
thank you

entry.title: Data Point comment transport from one tenant to another.
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are planning to migrate from one tenant to another.

We are having Data point comments column in the story. May I know the possibilities for the transport of these comments? (It is using Analytical Model - Import)

If there are no possibilities... I believe taking the Excel export is the only way to take the backups.

Please correct me if I am wrong or provide any new solutions if possible 🙂

Kind regards,

Tha.Ram

entry.title: SAC Currency Conversion - Source Currency Not Fixed
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 

In SAC Company Code dimension, is it possible to maintain multicurrency against a company code? 
The requirement is that user will input any of the these currencies (USD, EUR, JPY, GBP) in the Foreign Currency measure and it should be converted to PKR. 
How to achieve that? Since in my Foreign Currency measure I either have to fix a currency or have to select the company code dimension since it has the currency property. By selecting company code dimension, if I select company code filter it will detect it as PKR. 

Please help

entry.title: What is the best type of connection between SAP Analytics Cloud and S/4HANA On-Premise 2023?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,
The scenario involves connecting directly using standard CDS views. However, we’re facing some issues: in some cases, the CDS views appear but don’t load data, and in others, even standard CDS views don’t appear as available.
Through my research, I found that SAP DataSphere offers an SAP ABAP connection, but I couldn't locate the same option in SAC. Ultimately, I need to know the best type of connection (on-prem) to reliably read CDS views and build dashboards in SAC.
Thank you.

entry.title: SAP Cloud Appliance Library is loading, please wait... error
entry.content:
Hi,

Does anyone know why the cloud service shows this SAP Cloud Appliance Library is loading, please wait... and its stuck there for 2 days now

entry.title: How to Calculate Average Daily Revenue Based on User Date Filters in SAP Analytics Cloud?
entry.content:
I want to create a story in SAP Analytics Cloud that displays the average daily revenue based on calendar days and the date filter that the user applies.

Specifically, in the model, I have records at the monthly level and amounts. Depending on the filter the user sets in the date field, I want to calculate the average revenue based on the number of days in the period specified by the user in the filter. How could this be done in SAC?

entry.title: Dynamic Page Filter radio button to select Current Week by default
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a SAC dashboard which has a Story filter on 'Snapshot Week'. It is a prompt from SAP BW live connection which shows data corresponding to 'Snapshot Weeks' every week. The page filter on this object shows a list of all weeks back in time for which the data resides.

My requirement is simple - When the dashboard is opened, then by default this 'Snapshot Week' filter should have selected the Current Week (say 44.2024) instead of 23.2024 (shown in pic) which is the preselected value when the story is saved. Every Week I do not want to manually change the filter and save the query. It needs to be automatically pre-selected to latest week. 

A step by step process to achieve this will be appreciated as I am new to SAC. Thanks.

entry.title: Hello
entry.content: Excited to start learning SAP!

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud: Newly Created Members Delay In Story and Data Action
entry.content:
Hello

In SAP Analytics Cloud, I have a 2 steps process:

  1. Creation of Members through Scripting.

        PlanningModel.createMembers("DimensionName",MemberArray );]

    2. Call Data Action  (through script) with the new members as parameter

          DataAction1.setParameterValue("DimensionName", MemberArray);
          DataAction1.execute();

My requirement is to execute both steps sequentially but there is an inconsistency with the create Members step. Even though the members are created (verified though debugging and also refreshing the dim table), there is a delay (sometimes consequential) between the time of member creation and availability in both stories and Data Action. Therefore, the Data Action fails because newly created members are tagged as invalid even though they are already in the dimension table. The volume of the data is not a factor here as there is no clear pattern on when there is a delay or not.

  • I have tried refreshing both the table and the application before calling the data action but that does not help.
  • I have tried reading if the member is created in the dimension table before calling the Data Action but that is also not working since the newly created member is not detected yet in the Data Action even though available in the dimension table.
  • I can't use a delay mechanism here as it varies a lot

Eventually ,the story and DA will detected the new members and execute properly but the delay does not make this a viable option since the process needs immediate execution.

Is there another kind of refresh and configuration that can help with this? 😞

entry.title: Using Current Date Input Control in SAC Advanced Filters
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am trying to setup advanced filters to dynamically set the cutover date of a planning table in SAC. I have already been able to do this using the system date. In this case, it automatically sets the cutover date to the current year automatically on January 1st of every year. It shows the Actuals for past years and PLanning Values for the current and future years. 

However if I am trying to make this cutover year date switch sometime during the year, say March 1st instead of Jan 1st, I will have to use the Current Date Input Control and somehow modify this Current Date Input Control using script. I have not been able to find a way to interact with this Current Date Input Cotrol in script. Is there an API for this? I am able to change Dimension Filters and also Story Filters and Variables using the SetDimensionFilterwith Hierarchy and the GetFileDataSource API's. I want to do the same for the Current Date Input Control.

 

Thanks!

 

David

entry.title: Publish Data - SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Every time I try to publish my data to SAP Analytics Cloud, this message appears:

Some data modifications cannot be published for one or more reasons, for example limited access rights. If this version is published, the changes will be lost.

How can I solve this problem? Because I have a dimension that has access control, but when the user tries to insert data and publish in the dimension that he has access to, he would have to remain normal and not distribute the input value, as he is doing now.

entry.title: How can I use people scope for one query and only th particular widget but not applied to all others
entry.content:
Hi,

Please help if I can create two different queries and only apply people scope to one query in one report?

I'm trying to build one widget on total headcount and FTE for the whole organisation and another widget to reflect one manager's direct reports headcounts and FTE. I'd like to have these two widgets in one report side by side. The problem is that when I shared the report to the managers, their organisation headcounts widgets turn to report his direct reports headcount as well. It became two widget reporting the same data.

One query is based on User. The field I selected can be accessed by all. The other query is based on Job Info which is RBP restricted to direct reports only.

I would like to de-couple these two queries and widgets. Please help.

Thank you.

Sophia Cheng

entry.title: From where in S4 can I find the SAC values for Rate types like average and closing (currency)?
entry.content:
I'm currently building a model in SAC where data is imported from S4. The dimensions used in the model are Profit Center, Cost Center, GL Account, and Company Code. 

As I need currency conversion in the model, I am wondering if I can obtain directly from the system the SAC type required for the currency conversion such as average or closing. 

For example I know that for GL Account, there is a specific property called SAC Account Type available in an API in S4 so that you can upload the data in SAC with the correct SAC type. Im wondering if there is something similar in terms of currency. 

Thanks,

entry.title: Calculated Measures Subtracting Data from Different Months
entry.content:
Hi,

We are currently facing a problem with two Excel files that contain the same measures but yield different results. I want to create a calculated measure that subtracts "dotacoes" for February 2024 (202402) from "dotacoes" for January 2024 (202401). However, I am unable to access the measure "dotacoes" for both February 2024 (202402) and January 2024 (202401) in order to perform this subtraction.

Could you assist me in resolving this issue?

Thanks in advance!

GAnjos

entry.title: how can I change my Change Dimension Type of my own data timestamp in analytic cloud
entry.content:
how to solve this problem?

this is my timestamp format in my csv file

entry.title: SAC/SAP S4/HANA EXCEL EXPORT AND IMPORT
entry.content:
Hi team,

I am having an issue of toughts because it was given to me a database on SAP S4/HANA to export data to an excel and then import to SAC, but all the data is accumulated and they asked me to present by each month and year. First i tried to export each month by itself, but when i get to February the data of that month comes with january too, so that outcome its not possible, so i tried to add and Calculated measure, the idea was "if the date was = to 202402 the measure on the excel of february would subtract to the measure of the excel file of january so i only had the numbers of february, but i tried everything and i couldnt reach an out come by using all the commands of SAC.

If anyone could help me i would eternly gratefull.

Have a blessing day

PS: I will leave here an print of the excel. This excel doesnt have an date registered on it, i know the month because o filter them in SAP before i export.

 

Bernardo Santos

entry.title: Blended Calculation supported by Optimised design experience in the tables?
entry.content:
Hello @laura_vega

Does Blended Calculation supported by Optimised design experience in the tables? 

Could you please confirm on this or any roadmap planned. Your guidance will be of great support. 

Regards

Akshay

entry.title: Need help adding Live Connection from SAC to S/4Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Cannot add Live connection from S/4Hana Public Cloud
Both SAC and S/4Hana use the same identity provider (IAS)
Already created communication user (which is "SAC_LIVE_USER" in the screenshot)

All configurations follow this instruction

I tried to find a way to configure the InA role in S/4Hana but not found it yet.

Thanks,
Pakorn

entry.title: Rankby Top5 values in a chart usign a script
entry.content:
Dimension: Country
Measure: Total Number

Can you please help me with the syntax as I am facing issue with the code.

Chart_1.rankby("xxx", RankOrder.Top, value:5)

Can you help me with what type of syntax/value I have to replace the "xxx", is it a script variable with type number/string etc. which I have to create or is something else?

Thank you.

entry.title: Restrict Data Import Connecation in SAC
entry.content:
Hello experts,
I would like to bring HR data (Succsess Factors) to the SAC with an import data connection. The HR data is sometimes partially protected and should not be accessible to everyone. Is there a setting in which I can restrict the model creation to certain data connections? For example, that only employees from the HR department can set up a data connection to Success Factors?

Regards Niels
